inputs.label: Initial Deposit
inputs.businessContext: Amount of money initially deposited into the CD.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual percentage yield (APY) offered by the CD.

inputs.label: Term Length
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the CD in months.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of times interest is compounded per year (e.g., 12 for monthly).

inputs.label: Additional Monthly Deposit
inputs.businessContext: Optional additional deposit made each month.

formulas.finalBalance: initialDeposit * Math.pow(1 + (annualRate / 100) / compoundingFrequency, compoundingFrequency * (termMonths / 12)) + additionalDeposit * ((Math.pow(1 + (annualRate / 100) / compoundingFrequency, compoundingFrequency * (termMonths / 12)) - 1) / ((annualRate / 100) / compoundingFrequency))
